title: GAP MINISTRIES - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF TIGARD, TUALATIN, AND SHERWOOD GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, hygiene supplies, household goods, bedding/linens, over-the counter medicines and supplies, financial training, assistance with resume writing, and nutrition courses. Requests are screened and referred to outside agencies for fulfillment. Assistance is dependent upon available funding and not guaranteed. Also accepts donations of bedding/linens and personal grooming supplies. 10900 SW 121st Avenue Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 443-6888 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 443-6888 Main phone Main phone (503) 443-6888 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to apply or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Sherwood, Tigard, and Tualatin SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Wednesday 9:30am-12:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near the corner of SW Scholls Ferry Road and SW 121st Avenue Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Financial Literacy Training Furniture General Clothing Provision General Medical Equipment/Supplies Provision Kitchenware Nutrition Education Personal/Grooming Supplies Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Prejob Guidance Specialized Information and Referral If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC OF TIGARD, TUALATIN, AND SHERWOOD
